prompt:
Create a polished anime-style sci‑fi factory scene inside a spacious high-tech electronics manufacturing lab operated by Union Grotti. The main subject is Angelica, a cute iridescent holographic girl standing in the foreground slightly right of center, carefully inspecting a manufacturing process with a clipboard in one hand and a stylus pen in the other. Her face is intentionally obscured by a vertical beige censor rectangle, but her short bob hair remains visible: shimmering pastel rainbow hair with glossy highlights, a small blue wing hair clip, and a little ahoge curl on top. She wears a translucent pearlescent white-and-blue short-sleeve dress with a large blue bow at the collar, buttons down the front, puff sleeves, blue trim, and a layered frilly skirt that refracts cyan, pink, and violet light.

Show a large automated robotic assembly machine on the left producing generic controller SoC circuit boards: two articulated robotic arms with precision soldering or welding tips point down at a complex circuit board, creating a small bright spark at the center chip. Include a heavy industrial machine head above the board with a glowing white ring light, black and gunmetal mechanical housings, cables, rails, and clean modular equipment. In the lower foreground, include trays and open containers holding multiple populated circuit boards and chip modules, plus one small angled touchscreen control panel displaying blue technical UI graphics.

Set the scene in a modern glass-and-steel corporate factory interior with high ceilings, mezzanine walkways, large windows, polished reflective floors, workbenches, shelves, and cool daylight. In the background on the right, include a casual staff break area with exactly four visible seated or standing people: one brown-haired cat-ear anime girl sitting on a stool drinking from a cup, one blonde person seated at a table, one dark-haired person seated beside them, and one additional staff member farther back near the counter. Add a minimalist geometric company logo on the far wall. Populate the image with exactly nine floating translucent soap bubbles or holographic spheres of different sizes, reflecting the factory lights and machinery; distribute them around the robot, the main character, and the lower foreground.

Visual style: high-detail anime illustration, glossy futuristic industrial design, cinematic lighting, soft bloom, pastel iridescence, cool blue-gray factory palette contrasted with rainbow highlights, crisp mechanical detail, depth of field, 4:3 composition, no text captions, no watermark. The mood should feel like a calm production inspection of an export-spec Blueprint composite construction device in operation.
